title: Camouflage
goal: Cross open water by matching your skin to the seabed band you're over, staying camouflaged through hunter scans until you reach the reef.
mechanics: color_swap: set octopus skin to a palette color via number keys
band_matching: octopus is camouflaged while its color equals the active band under it
scan_dodge: at each timed hunter scan, must be matched or get spotted
combo_scoring: continuous matching builds a score multiplier, resets on mismatch
pearl_collect: ink-pearls bank points only when collected while matched
win_condition: Reach the reef at the level's distance with at least 1 life remaining.
fail_condition: Get spotted (color mismatched at a scan tick) enough times to lose all 3 lives.

entities.name: Octopus
entities.behavior: fixed screen x; player sets its color; camouflaged when color == active band

entities.name: Seabed
entities.behavior: streams colored bands leftward at scroll_speed; band under octopus = active band

entities.name: ScanController
entities.behavior: every scan_interval s, telegraph for `telegraph` s then scan; mismatch at scan tick => spotted

entities.name: InkPearl
entities.behavior: floats within bands; +points when grabbed while matched

entities.name: Reef
entities.behavior: appears at distance D; touching it = level clear

difficulty_principle: change one knob per level (a new colour OR more speed OR tighter scans), never all at once; level 0 is an unfailable tutorial
feasibility_rule: scan_interval - telegraph >= 0.25 (human reaction floor); build agent must keep every level solvable

accessibility.color_plus_symbol: never rely on colour alone; each colour has a distinct symbol on bands, octopus, and keys
accessibility.audio_telegraph: a rising hum pitches up toward each scan so the cue is not sight- or colour-dependent

preview_lane.purpose: anticipation over twitch; makes reaction windows feel fair

feedback.near_miss: 'close!' spark if matched within 0.15s of scan

onboarding: level 0 is unfailable: 2 colours, slow scroll, huge telegraph; teaches swap then match-before-scan

tier1_build: headless run reaches reef and emits result+done markers

policies.competent: ~250ms reaction model: swap to the upcoming band before the scan

healthy_criteria: random completion well below target (skill must matter, not luck)
softlock_rate ~= 0 (scroll guarantees progress; a stall is a bug)

tier3_fun: human tester rating — never an LLM judge

art_direction.octopus: faint glow in its current color
art_direction.scan: edge sweep line + rising hum + brief desaturation flash at scan tick
art_direction.hud: distance bar, lives, combo, score — minimal

build_notes: Single Main scene: Octopus, Seabed spawner, ScanController, PearlSpawner, HUD
Drive all difficulty from levels[] so the playtest agent can retune via data, not code
Emit the [INKO] markers so Tier 1/2 verification works out of the box
Ship level 1, verify, then add levels as data — no feature creep
